data.title: CleanSpark sells $48.7M in Bitcoin; now holds over 13K BTC in treasury. Stock up 5% on increased production in September.
data.description: CleanSpark, a miner listed on the Nasdaq, saw a more than 5% increase in shares on Friday following a report of increased production in September.

data.title: Palantir refutes outdated security flaw report with Anduril, shares dipped by 7%, Army memo cites high-risk concern.
data.description: Palantir Technologies, Inc. refuted a report on security flaws in its battlefield communications technology created with Anduril Industries Inc., suggesting the information was outdated and inaccurate. This led to a 7% drop in Palantir's shares on Friday. An Army memo, as revealed by Reuters, cautioned in September against the high risk associated with the Next Generation Command and Control (NGC2) platform prototype. The platform was flagged due to potential vulnerabilities that could be exploited by adversaries. For more details, the full news story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Skylar debuts new fragrance "Double Dates" inspired by Leah Kateb's heritage with sweet dates, toffee, and brown sugar.
data.description: Skylar introduces the luxurious scent Double Dates, combining sweet dates, sticky toffee, and brown sugar, influenced by Leah Kateb's cultural background and love for edible fragrances. The launch took place in Los Angeles on October 3, 2025. This marks Skylar's latest and most indulgent scent in their collection.

data.title: Titan Pharmaceuticals finalized merger with Black Titan Corp and TalenTec; shares to trade as NASDAQ: BTTC.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, Titan Pharmaceuticals, Inc. completed its merger with Black Titan Corporation and TalenTec Sdn. Bhd. The newly formed entity, which will trade on Nasdaq under the symbol NASDAQ: BTTC, has become operational. The company's ordinary shares, valued at $0.0001 per share, are now available for trading on the stock exchange. This merger marks a significant milestone for Titan Pharmaceuticals, Inc., involving key players in the industry and offering new trading opportunities for investors.

data.title: Helium Corp. updates shareholders due to postal strike; materials for meeting can be requested via email or accessed online.
data.description: As a result of the ongoing Postal Strike, shareholders are advised to request shareholder meeting materials through email or via the Company's website. This alternative method allows shareholders to access important documents such as annual reports, proxy statements, and voting materials electronically, ensuring they can participate in the decision-making process amidst the postal service disruption. Shareholders are encouraged to provide their email addresses to receive these materials promptly and efficiently. This option ensures that shareholders can stay informed and engaged, contributing to the successful conduct of the upcoming shareholder meeting during this period of postal service disruption.

data.title: LatinFinance reveals winners of 2025 Project & Infrastructure Finance Awards in NYC, highlighting top transactions and institutions in Latin America and Caribbean.
data.description: The 2025 Project & Infrastructure Finance Awards winners were recently revealed by LatinFinance in New York. The awards highlight outstanding transactions and institutions in a vital sector for the economic advancement of Latin America and the Caribbean. This recognition honors the top performers in the industry, showcasing their contributions to the region's development.

data.title: LGI Homes closed 354 homes in September 2025 and 1,107 homes in Q3, including 28 and 42 leased single-family homes, respectively.
data.description: In The Woodlands, Texas, on October 3, 2025, LGI Homes, Inc. (NASDAQ: LGIH) shared that they finalized the sale of 354 homes in September 2025. This figure comprises the closure of 28 single-family rental homes that were either currently or previously leased. Throughout the third quarter of 2025, a sum of 1,107 homes were closed, with 42 of them being single-family rental homes that were either currently or previously leased.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation swaps 1,000 ETH for stablecoins to boost funding on research, grants, and DeFi.
data.description: The sale of 1,000 ETH by the Ethereum Foundation through CoW Swap for stablecoins is aimed at bolstering research, grants, and DeFi funding within their treasury plan.

data.title: Used construction equipment inventory levels are stabilizing in September on Sandhills platforms, indicating recovery.
data.description: In Lincoln, Nebraska on October 3, 2025, the latest market reports from Sandhills Global revealed trends in used construction equipment, farm machinery, trucks, and trailers for September. The reports indicated that inventory levels for heavy-duty and medium-duty construction equipment are stabilizing on Sandhills platforms. This data provides valuable insights into the current market conditions, guiding industry professionals in making informed decisions.

data.title: Shift4 declares $1.50 dividend per share to be paid on Nov 3, 2025, to holders as of Oct 15, 2025 for 10,000,000 shares of 6% Series A Preferred Stock.
data.description: CENTER VALLEY, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- Shift4 Payments, Inc. (NYSE: FOUR) unveiled that they will issue a cash dividend of $1.50 per share for the 10,000,000 shares of 6% Series A Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock issued on May 5, 2025. The dividend is set to be paid on November 3, 2025, to shareholders of record as of October 15, 2025. This declaration was made by the Board of Directors in accordance with the terms of the Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock.
